commitMessage:
fix(homepage): stabilize desktop 'Up Next' hero overlays during events scroll

- Move events list fade-mask updates to requestAnimationFrame and inline styles to prevent React re-renders during scroll
- Promote hero overlays (gradient, bottom bar, title) to their own compositor layers (translateZ(0), backface-visibility) to eliminate flicker/jitter
- Add maxButtonSize guard to SocialMediaButtons and compute ceiling from video alignment so buttons never overflow/right-hero constraints

Scope: desktop (>=1024px) only; no changes to mobile/tablet or component visuals/behaviors
Accessibility: preserved roles, labels, keyboard interactions
Security: no security-impacting changes
